## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between town.com and growthx.ai for AI-driven content creation and marketing strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/3KP5XytrdxKyAeDJgNXeWZQk1TTs7hNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [town.com is seeking to build content and web presence for their SMB tax prep service from July to December](https://fathom.video/share/3KP5XytrdxKyAeDJgNXeWZQk1TTs7hNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [growthx.ai offers a comprehensive AI-powered content strategy and execution service, including expert-led planning and custom AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/3KP5XytrdxKyAeDJgNXeWZQk1TTs7hNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [Initial engagement is $20k for 8-week strategy sprint, followed by ongoing execution at $12-15k/month (flexible based on needs)](https://fathom.video/share/3KP5XytrdxKyAeDJgNXeWZQk1TTs7hNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
  - [Jean-Denis expressed interest in working together, pending timeline considerations around town.com's upcoming rebrand](https://fathom.video/share/3KP5XytrdxKyAeDJgNXeWZQk1TTs7hNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)

## Topics

### town.com's Current Status and Needs

  - [\~$500k ARR, targeting SMBs ($100k-$10M revenue) for automated tax prep](https://fathom.video/share/3KP5XytrdxKyAeDJgNXeWZQk1TTs7hNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [Aiming to build brand recognition and direct customer acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/3KP5XytrdxKyAeDJgNXeWZQk1TTs7hNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [Need to develop content strategy and web presence before tax season (Jan-Apr)](https://fathom.video/share/3KP5XytrdxKyAeDJgNXeWZQk1TTs7hNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [Upcoming rebrand in July; want to align content efforts with this](https://fathom.video/share/3KP5XytrdxKyAeDJgNXeWZQk1TTs7hNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)

### growthx.ai's Offering

  - [AI-powered content creation platform with expert-led strategy](https://fathom.video/share/3KP5XytrdxKyAeDJgNXeWZQk1TTs7hNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
  - [Custom AI workflows for research, writing, fact-checking, and more](https://fathom.video/share/3KP5XytrdxKyAeDJgNXeWZQk1TTs7hNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=656.0)
  - [Two-phase engagement: Strategy Sprint ($20k, 8 weeks) + Execution Phase ($12-25k/month)](https://fathom.video/share/3KP5XytrdxKyAeDJgNXeWZQk1TTs7hNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
  - [Adaptable to client needs, from full-service content creation to strategy-only](https://fathom.video/share/3KP5XytrdxKyAeDJgNXeWZQk1TTs7hNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)

### Technical Infrastructure

  - [AI coding agent that builds and executes complex workflows](https://fathom.video/share/3KP5XytrdxKyAeDJgNXeWZQk1TTs7hNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=656.0)
  - [Robust runtime layer processing \~500k runs/month](https://fathom.video/share/3KP5XytrdxKyAeDJgNXeWZQk1TTs7hNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
  - [Building a "lovable slash bold meets cursor" platform for workflow management](https://fathom.video/share/3KP5XytrdxKyAeDJgNXeWZQk1TTs7hNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=656.0)

### Content Strategy and Execution Process

  - [Expert-led strategy development (editorial tone, content types, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/3KP5XytrdxKyAeDJgNXeWZQk1TTs7hNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)
  - [AI-assisted content creation with human oversight and editing](https://fathom.video/share/3KP5XytrdxKyAeDJgNXeWZQk1TTs7hNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Ongoing collaboration and strategy refinement](https://fathom.video/share/3KP5XytrdxKyAeDJgNXeWZQk1TTs7hNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1605.0)

### Considerations for town.com

  - [Domain has low authority; caution advised against large-scale programmatic content](https://fathom.video/share/3KP5XytrdxKyAeDJgNXeWZQk1TTs7hNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)
  - [Gradual, quality-focused approach recommended to build credibility](https://fathom.video/share/3KP5XytrdxKyAeDJgNXeWZQk1TTs7hNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)
  - [Alignment with upcoming rebrand and existing persona research important](https://fathom.video/share/3KP5XytrdxKyAeDJgNXeWZQk1TTs7hNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1773.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jean-Denis to email Marcel next week with proposed timeline for engagement](https://fathom.video/share/3KP5XytrdxKyAeDJgNXeWZQk1TTs7hNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)
  - [Marcel to send sample SLW (Service Level Worksheet) for Jean-Denis to review](https://fathom.video/share/3KP5XytrdxKyAeDJgNXeWZQk1TTs7hNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1795.0)
  - [Potential follow-up discussion on marketing strategy, leveraging Marcel's CMO experience](https://fathom.video/share/3KP5XytrdxKyAeDJgNXeWZQk1TTs7hNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1829.0)
